---
title: "Commute"
description: |
  Getting from home to work, unfortunately
date: '2026-03-06'
image: "commute.jpg"
categories:
    - DC
    - Adventure
format: html
toc: true
lightbox: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("packages.R"))
source(here("functions.R"))

series_filter = 9

data = pollresults(series_filter)
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Mode")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Audio")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Route")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Biking")
```

```{r}
simple_bar_question(data, "Escalators")
```
